expired.title: This gallery has expired
expired.body: The photographer has set an expiration date on this gallery. Contact them if you need access.

password.title: Protected Gallery
password.label: Password
password.error: Something went wrong — please try again

reviewer.title: Team Review
reviewer.body: Enter your name so the photographer can see your selections.

gallery.photoCount: {count, plural, =0 {No photos} one {# photo} other {# photos}}

view.downloadFiles: Download {count, plural, one {# file} other {# files}}
view.emptyGallery: No images in this gallery yet.
view.collabHint: Flag or like photos to share your selection.

lightbox.noPreview: No preview available — download the original file.

annotations.hint: Draw on the photo to leave a note
annotations.namePromptBody: Enter your name so the photographer knows who left the note.

upload.addedPending: {count, plural, one {# photo uploaded — awaiting the photographer's approval} other {# photos uploaded — awaiting the photographer's approval}}
upload.promptBody: Enter your name so the photographer knows who uploaded them.

downloadDialog.title: Download Gallery
downloadDialog.bodyWithSubs: This gallery contains sub-galleries. Choose whether to include them in the download, then start the download.
downloadDialog.bodyNoSubs: Start the download of this gallery.
downloadDialog.includeAll: Include all sub-galleries in the download
downloadDialog.noFilesWarning: Your current selection does not hold any files. Include galleries with files to enable the download.

auth.setupDescription: Create your admin account to get started.

shell.signOutBody: End your session on this device, or sign out on all devices to revoke every active session (other browsers, devices, or a leaked login).

galleries.photoSearchEmpty: No photos match your search. Try a different term.
galleries.photoResultCount: {n, plural, =1 {1 photo across all galleries} other {# photos across all galleries}}
galleries.dropTopLevel: Drop here to move to top level
galleries.organizeHint: Drag a gallery onto another to nest it, onto a folder in the left tree, or onto “Drop here to move to top level” to pull it out.
galleries.emptyFolder: No sub-galleries here. Open this gallery to add photos.
galleries.emptyRoot: No galleries yet. Click Create New Gallery to get started.
galleries.deleteBody: Permanently delete {name}? This cannot be undone.
galleries.deleteSubWarning: This also deletes {count, plural, one {its # sub-gallery} other {its # sub-galleries}} and all photos inside.

dialogs.titlePrompt: Please enter a title for your new gallery.
dialogs.chooseMode: Choose how you want clients to see it:
dialogs.changeLater: You can always change your mind later.
dialogs.subGalleryInherit: The sub-gallery starts with the parent's look & behaviour — adjust it any time in the sub-gallery's settings.

detail.emptyNoImages: No images yet — drag photos onto the zone below.
detail.emptyFiltered: No images match the current filter.
detail.noSubGalleries: No sub-galleries inside this gallery yet. Click Create Sub-Gallery to add one.
detail.containerHint: This gallery holds sub-galleries. Open one below, or add photos to this gallery itself.
detail.exportHint: {count, plural, =0 {No flagged images yet} one {# flagged image} other {# flagged images}} — filenames for Lightroom / Capture One.
detail.deleteGalleryBody: Permanently delete {name}? This cannot be undone.
detail.deleteCollectionBody: Delete collection {name}? The photos themselves stay in the gallery — only this saved selection is removed.
detail.emptyBody: All files and sub-galleries will be deleted. The empty gallery and its settings will remain.
detail.deleteSelectionBody: {count, plural, one {# selected photo will be} other {# selected photos will be}} permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
detail.moveSelectionTitle: Move {count, plural, one {# image} other {# images}}
detail.batchRenameTitle: Rename {count, plural, one {# photo} other {# photos}}
detail.batchDuplicateWarning: Some names are identical — duplicates are auto-numbered in downloads.
detail.batchApply: Rename {count, plural, one {# photo} other {# photos}}
detail.moveGalleryHint: Choose a parent gallery, or move it to the top level. Any sub-galleries move with it.

fromImages.title: Create gallery from {count, plural, one {# photo} other {# photos}}
fromImages.done: {count, plural, one {# photo} other {# photos}} ready
fromImages.copyHint: Duplicates the photos; the source gallery stays unchanged.
fromImages.moveHint: Moves the photos out of this gallery.
fromImages.moveCollectionHint: Moves the photos out of this gallery and removes the collection.

toast.collectionLastImage: A collection must keep at least one photo
toast.imagesMoved: {count, plural, one {# image} other {# images}} moved
toast.imagesDeleted: {count, plural, one {# image} other {# images}} deleted
toast.imagesRenamed: {count, plural, one {# photo} other {# photos}} renamed
toast.headerUpdated: Header image updated — set your focus point
toast.photosMoved: {count, plural, one {# photo} other {# photos}} moved

share.title: Share link
share.tip: Tip: set a Public base URL in Settings so links use your client domain.
share.slugHint: Lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens (3–80 characters).
share.guessableWarning: This link is easy to guess. Add a password under Settings → Security to keep the gallery private.
share.copyFailed: Couldn't copy automatically — select the link and copy it manually.

copyFilenames.title: Copy filenames
copyFilenames.countFiltered: {count, plural, one {# filtered file} other {# filtered files}}
copyFilenames.pasteHint: Paste the list into Capture One, Photo Mechanic, or Lightroom to find the matching files.
copyFilenames.excludeHint: Export IMG_1234 instead of IMG_1234.jpg — matches RAW files (.ARW, .CR3 …) too.
copyFilenames.includeSubsHint: Also add photos from {count, plural, one {# nested gallery} other {# nested galleries}} (same filters applied).
copyFilenames.includeSubsDisabled: Not available while a collection or search filter is active.
copyFilenames.emptyPlaceholder: No files match the current filter.
copyFilenames.clipboardError: Couldn't access the clipboard — select the text and copy manually.
copyFilenames.formatTxtHint: The list above, as a file

headerImage.title: Edit Header Image
headerImage.focusHint: Click the image to set the focus point (red dot). The most important part of your photo will stay in frame when cropped.
headerImage.noImage: No header image is set. Click <upload>upload file</upload> or drag an image from your desktop to set one.

coverImage.title: Cover Image
coverImage.pickFromGallery: Or choose a photo from this gallery
coverImage.hint: Upload a custom card image for this gallery — useful when it has no photos yet.

activity.title: Activity Log
activity.downloadedCount: downloaded {count, plural, one {# photo} other {# photos}}
activity.uploadedCount: uploaded {count, plural, one {# photo} other {# photos}}

voting.title: Team Voting Summary
voting.summary: {images, plural, one {# image} other {# images}} voted on by {reviewers, plural, one {# reviewer} other {# reviewers}}

imageGrid.emptyFiltered: No images match the current filter.
imageGrid.approved: {count, plural, one {# upload approved} other {# uploads approved}}

uploadZone.title: Add photos & videos
uploadZone.subtitle: Drop files or folders anywhere on the page to upload
uploadZone.formats: JPEG, PNG, WebP, TIFF, PSD, PSB & RAW up to 300 MB · MP4, MOV, WebM up to 2 GB

search.title: Content Search
search.intro: Find photos by what's actually in them — "car at sunset", "team photo with trophy" — instead of by filename. Photos are indexed once by an on-device AI model; nothing leaves your server.
search.enableHint: Indexes your library so you can search photos by their visual content.
search.unavailableBody: It needs the optional ML service, which isn't deployed. It's an opt-in add-on — fine to leave off on a low-power host. To enable it, start the stack with the "ml" profile:
search.unavailableUnreachable: The ML service is set up but isn't responding right now. Make sure its container is running:
search.unavailableEnvHint: …and set ML_SERVICE_URL=http://ml:8001 in your .env, then reload this page.
search.accuracyHint: How close a match has to be to show up. Lower is broader (more results), higher is stricter.
search.thresholdHint: A good starting point is around 8%. Raise it if searches return too many loose matches, lower it if relevant photos are missing.
search.sidecarStalledHint: The ML service responds but its model isn't loading, so every image fails to index. Check the sidecar logs (`docker compose logs ml`) — a common cause is the model-cache directory not being writable by the container.

account.title: Account
account.usernameDescription: The name you use to sign in. Enter your current password to confirm the change.
account.description: Change the password you use to sign in to the admin area.
account.signsOutOthers: Changing your password signs you out on all other devices. This device stays signed in.

workspace.title: Workspace
workspace.subtitle: Your personal admin preferences — theme and how galleries look to you while you work. Clients are never affected.
workspace.themeHint: Applies to the admin area only.
workspace.languageHint: The language of your admin area. Clients see galleries in their own browser language.
workspace.photoGridHint: How the photo grid looks while you work inside a gallery.
workspace.displayHint: Match the client view, or use your own density.
workspace.overviewHint: The cover grid on the All Galleries page.
workspace.name: Name

general.title: General
general.publicBaseUrlHint: Origin used when building client share links. Set this when clients reach galleries through a reverse proxy on a different domain. Leave blank to use the current host.
general.sourceHint: ContactSheet is free software under the GNU AGPL-3.0-or-later. The complete source — including any modifications running on this instance — is available to everyone.
general.sourceUrlHint: Where the source link points. If you've modified ContactSheet, set this to your own repository so users get the version actually running here (AGPL requirement). Leave blank to use the upstream repository.
general.activityHint: Record gallery opens and downloads in each gallery's activity log.
general.ipLoggingHint: Store the client IP on opens, downloads and uploads so you can tell visitors apart. IP addresses are personal data — enable only with a legal basis. Also turns on logging of gallery opens.
general.ipRetentionHint: Stored IPs are erased from older activity entries after this many days. The entries themselves stay.

danger.title: Danger zone
danger.description: Reset ContactSheet to a fresh install. Deletes all galleries, photos, feedback and settings, and clears your admin account. This cannot be undone.
danger.dialogBody: This permanently deletes all galleries, photos, comments, collections and settings, and signs you out. You'll set up ContactSheet again from scratch. This cannot be undone.
danger.backupHint: Tip: back up your data directory (database + uploads) before resetting — there is no undo.

backup.title: Backup & restore
backup.description: Capture the whole instance to a downloadable archive, or restore one to bring everything back. Useful before upgrades and for moving to a new host.
backup.scopeFullHint: Everything needed for a complete restore: database, originals, branding and watermarks.
backup.scopeMetadataHint: Database, branding and watermarks — no original photos. Smaller, for when your photos are backed up elsewhere.
backup.includeRenditionsHint: Keep thumbnails and previews in the archive. Turn off for a smaller file — they'll be regenerated after a restore.
backup.securityWarning: Keep this file safe: it contains your photos, password hash and security keys. Anyone with it can stand up a copy of your instance.
backup.restoreDescription: Replace this instance with the contents of a backup archive. Best done on a fresh install.
backup.restoreDialogBody: This overwrites the current database and media with the archive's contents, and signs you out. This cannot be undone.
backup.restoreSuccess: Restore complete — please sign in again.

maintenance.title: Image previews
maintenance.description: Rebuild missing or outdated thumbnails and previews from the original photos. Useful if some images show as broken. Runs in the background and is safe to run anytime.

branding.title: Branding
branding.studioNameHint: Shown in the admin sidebar and the client gallery header.
branding.noLogoHint: No logo uploaded yet — the name shows until you add one below.
branding.nameColorHint: Leave blank to use the theme's default text color.
branding.accentColorHint: Buttons and highlights in the admin UI, and accent details in client galleries.
branding.accentGradientHint: Render primary buttons as a subtle gradient of the accent color.
branding.logoHint: PNG, JPEG, or WebP. Shown in the admin sidebar, the client gallery header, and the login screen. Without a logo the login shows the ContactSheet mark.

footer.title: Footer
footer.subtitle: A branding footer shown at the bottom of every public gallery. Only filled-in fields appear. Icons use your accent color (set under Appearance).
footer.showFooterHint: Turn the branding footer on for all public galleries.
footer.contactSocialHint: Enter just the handle. Drag to reorder — empty rows are hidden on galleries.

galleryDefaults.title: Gallery Defaults
galleryDefaults.presetsHint: Adjust the default look & behaviour for newly created galleries, per mode. Existing galleries are not affected. Sub-galleries always start with their parent's settings instead.
galleryDefaults.viewingHint: Applies to every gallery, for clients and your admin grid alike.
galleryDefaults.highResHint: Sharp thumbnails and lightbox images on retina displays (800px / 2560px instead of 300px / 1920px). Uses more disk space and bandwidth; changing this resizes existing previews in the background.
galleryDefaults.backdropHint: Backdrop behind the full-screen photo viewer (client galleries and the admin gallery view). White and Frosted use dark controls; Dimmed and Black keep light controls.
galleryDefaults.ratingStyleHint: How reviewers rate photos across the whole instance — color flags or 1–5 stars. Switching is non-destructive; existing flags and stars are both kept.

gallery.title: Gallery Settings
gallery.description: Choose how this gallery opens for clients and fine-tune its behaviour. <link>Edit your defaults</link>.
gallery.subtitlePlaceholder: Smaller text shown beneath the title
gallery.clientUploadHint: Visitors can add their own photos to this gallery (both modes)
gallery.clientUploadModerationHint: Hold client uploads until you approve them — they stay private until then
gallery.openerIntro: The cover opener, shown in {mode} mode.
gallery.reviewIntro: Client feedback tools, shown in {mode} mode.
gallery.standaloneHintChild: Clients can't navigate up to the parent gallery or see sibling galleries.
gallery.standaloneHintParent: This top-level gallery has no parent to hide — enable “Apply to all sub-galleries” below to turn each sub-gallery into a standalone, private link.
gallery.expiresHint: Gallery becomes inaccessible after this date

fields.filenameHint: Caption each thumbnail with its filename
fields.filenameLightboxHint: Show the filename below the enlarged image
fields.iptcHint: Title, caption, keywords & rights in the lightbox
fields.colorFlagsHint: Clients can mark files with color flags
fields.teamVotingHint: Each named reviewer gets their own color flags (requires color flags)
fields.annotationsHint: Clients can pin notes to a spot or area on a photo
fields.collectionsHint: Clients can multi-select photos and save named collections
fields.watermarkHint: Overlay an image or text mark on client-facing photos

preset.title: {mode} Mode Preset
preset.subtitle: Defaults for newly created {mode} galleries. Existing galleries are not affected.

uploads.headerHint: PNG, JPEG, or WebP. Displayed as a banner above the gallery.
uploads.watermarkHint: PNG or WebP, will be composited on images

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Get notified when something happens in a gallery — a comment, a saved selection, a flag, or someone opening the share link. Channels are global; switch them on or off per gallery in its settings.
notifications.enableHint: Master switch. When off, nothing is sent regardless of the settings below.
notifications.eventsHint: Which kinds of activity to be notified about.
notifications.event_comment_hint: A client comments on a photo.
notifications.event_annotation_hint: A client draws an annotation on a photo.
notifications.event_collection_hint: A client saves a named selection (collection).
notifications.event_flag_hint: A client flags, likes or votes on a photo. Bundled per gallery to avoid spam.
notifications.event_upload_hint: A client uploads to a gallery that requires approval. Only fires when moderation is on.
notifications.event_view_hint: Someone opens the gallery. Can be chatty — off by default.
notifications.messageHint: Control what each notification says and whether it links back to the gallery.
notifications.includeLinkHint: Append the public gallery link to each message. Requires a Public Base URL (set under Sharing).
notifications.templatesHint: Customise the message text. Leave a field blank to use the default shown. The placeholders listed under each field are filled in per event.
notifications.channelsHint: Each channel is an Apprise URL — e.g. mailto://… for e-mail, pover://user@token for Pushover, or discord://… and ntfy://… for chat.
notifications.secretKeep: Leave secret fields blank to keep the saved values.
notifications.flushHint: How often queued events are sent. Bursts within this window are combined into one message per gallery. 15–3600s.
notifications.galleryToggleHint: Turn off to silence notifications for this gallery only.
notifications.event_download_hint: A client downloads photos (requests a ZIP).

errors.upload_too_large: This file is too large to upload.
errors.upload_unsupported_type: That file type isn't supported. Use JPEG, PNG, WebP, TIFF, PSD, or camera RAW.
errors.upload_content_mismatch: This file doesn't look like the image type it claims to be.
errors.client_upload_disabled: Uploads are no longer enabled for this gallery.
errors.client_upload_too_many: Too many files at once. Please upload fewer photos.
errors.client_upload_video: Videos can't be uploaded here — images only.
errors.annotations_disabled: Annotations are no longer enabled for this gallery.
errors.collection_forbidden: You can only change collections you created.
errors.rate_limited: You're doing that too fast — please wait a moment and try again.
errors.password_unchanged: Your new password must be different from the current one.
errors.username_unchanged: Your new username must be different from the current one.
errors.backup_invalid: This file isn't a valid ContactSheet backup.
errors.backup_corrupt: This backup failed its integrity check and may be damaged.
errors.backup_schema_newer: This backup is from a newer ContactSheet. Upgrade before restoring.
errors.backup_format_unsupported: This backup was made by a newer ContactSheet. Upgrade before restoring.
